write-section.description: Write or rewrite a paper section in PRL-style English from Chinese graduation thesis, with Eureka literature and Quill draft integration

paper-review.description: Review paper sections against mandatory writing rules: data fidelity, literature grounding, terminology, PRL style, completeness, narrative structure

paper-sync.description: Synchronize all paper data sources: dashboard, Eureka corpus, Quill draft, and Zotero literature

paper-compile.description: Compile all reviewed sections into final Manuscript_filled.tex with LaTeX verification and bibliography resolution
